stories.title: LeBron James — Day 24 of Free Agency; Decision Now "Imminent"

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Day 24 of LeBron James free agency.

The Heat posted — then deleted — a YouTube event titled "LeBron James Introductory Press Conference" for July 27.

Rich Paul: "Not going to be rushed."

Odds: Heat 48% | Cavs 27% | Warriors 14%

#LeBronJames #NBAFreeAgency

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
LeBron to a friend at Fanatics Fest last week:

"I won't hold you guys up too much longer."

That was July 17.

We're still waiting.

Heat. Cavs. Warriors. 76ers.

The whole NBA is on pause for one man's decision.

#LeBronJames #NBAFreeAgency

article.headline: Day 24: LeBron James Still Unsigned as NBA Holds Its Breath

stories.title: Stephen Curry Gets Basketball Hall of Fame Exhibit While Still Playing

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
The Basketball Hall of Fame just unveiled a Curry exhibit.

While he's still playing.

"Beyond the Arc" covers his career, philanthropy, and family.

First active NBA player honored this way in HoF history.

The game changed. They couldn't wait.

#StephenCurry #Warriors #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Stephen Curry's Hall of Fame exhibit opened today.

He hasn't retired yet.

Four titles. Two MVPs — one unanimous. All-time 3-point record.

The Basketball Hall of Fame said: we're not waiting.

"Beyond the Arc" is open now.

#StephenCurry #Warriors #NBA

article.headline: The Hall of Fame Couldn't Wait: Curry Gets an Exhibit While He's Still Playing

stories.title: Why Wembanyama Left $50 Million on the Table

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Victor Wembanyama signed a 5-year, $252M extension with San Antonio.

He left ~$50M on the table.

The supermax would have been $303M — he took the 25% max instead of 30%.

Age 22. Third-largest rookie extension in NBA history.

He chose the Spurs over the money.

#Spurs #NBA

article.headline: Wembanyama Left $50 Million on the Table — Here's What That Tells Us

stories.title: Kawhi Investigation — Still No Timeline, Raptors Remain Frozen

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Kawhi Leonard investigation is now ~a year old.

The Clippers-Raptors trade is still frozen.

Silver says it must end before next season.

HoopsHype: still weeks away.

Toronto can't plan. Kawhi is 35.

Nobody wins from this limbo.

#NBA #KawhiLeonard #Raptors

article.headline: A Year Later, the Kawhi Investigation Has No End in Sight — and the Raptors Are Paying for It
